messages.settings.title: Settings
messages.settings.subtitle: Personalize how this app works
messages.settings.placeholder.model: Open the list to fetch models, or type one
messages.popup.error.tauriUnavailable: Tauri API is unavailable; run this in the desktop app
messages.settings.description.startup: Control the behavior of the application when it starts up with the system and closes the main window.
messages.settings.description.launchAtLogin: Automatically run this application in the background after logging in to the system.
messages.settings.description.startMinimized: Do not display the main window when starting, only keep the tray icon.
messages.settings.description.showTrayIcon: The main window cannot be evoked through the tray after closing.
messages.settings.description.closeBehavior: Select the default behavior when closing the main window.
messages.settings.description.windowPolicy: Pre-created policy for translating pop-up windows and screenshot overlays, which will take effect after restarting the application.
messages.settings.description.popupPrecreate: Create a translation window at startup, and the word delineation response will be faster.
messages.settings.description.overlayPrecreate: Creates a screenshot overlay at startup, and the screenshot OCR response is faster.
messages.settings.description.appearance: Set the theme and interface language.
messages.settings.description.theme: Determine the color style of the main window and settings page.
messages.settings.description.update: Set the acquisition channel and detection behavior of the new version.
messages.settings.description.updateChannel: The Beta channel gets features earlier, but may not be stable enough.
messages.settings.description.defaultLanguages: Set the default language for word strokes, screenshots and clipboard translations.
messages.settings.description.defaultSourceLangua: After setting, it will no longer be automatically detected during translation.
messages.settings.description.defaultTargetLangua: Can be temporarily switched during translation.
messages.settings.description.autoDetectLanguage: Enabled when the source language cannot be determined.
messages.settings.description.translationBehavior: Control translation behaviors such as the clipboard.
messages.settings.description.autoCopy: Copy the translation to the clipboard after the translation is completed.
messages.settings.description.restoreClipboard: Restore the original clipboard content after translation.
messages.settings.description.lookupHistory: Adjust word retrieval and history record settings.
messages.settings.description.historyLimit: Old records that exceed the upper limit will be automatically cleared.
messages.settings.description.globalShortcuts: Press the key combination to record, Esc to cancel; also available when the application is not focused.
messages.settings.description.appShortcuts: Only takes effect when this application window is focused.
messages.settings.description.shortcutConflicts: The following shortcut keys are occupied by the system or other applications.
messages.settings.status.autoSaveDescription: Modifications will take effect immediately and be automatically saved
messages.settings.status.systemService: System-level service, cannot be turned off
messages.settings.status.reflectionEnabled: Enabled, a self-test will be performed after translation
messages.settings.status.reflectionDisabled: Disabled by default, after enabled, the quality is more stable but the response is slower
messages.settings.tooltip.validateApiKey: Verify whether the Key is valid
messages.settings.tooltip.retryValidation: The verification failed, click to re-verify
messages.settings.toast.openLanguageDirectoryFail: Failed to open the language pack directory
messages.settings.placeholder.channel: Please select or enter a new channel name
messages.settings.placeholder.note: For example: local Ollama / internal company proxy
messages.settings.combobox.chooseChannel: Please enter or select the channel
messages.settings.combobox.noMatchingModel: There is no matching model, you can use the input content directly
messages.settings.combobox.chooseModel: Please enter or select the model
messages.settings.shortcut.recording: Press the shortcut key (Esc to cancel)
messages.settings.shortcut.translate-selection.de: After selecting the text, press the shortcut key to translate.
messages.settings.shortcut.translate-screenshot.d: Select the screen area and then identify and translate it.
messages.settings.shortcut.word-lookup.label: Word translation
messages.settings.shortcut.word-lookup.descriptio: Displays the translation results when the cursor is hovering.
messages.settings.shortcut.open-settings.label: Open settings
messages.settings.description.logging: Set local log level and export logs.
messages.settings.description.logLevel: The debug level will generate a lot of logs.
messages.settings.description.exportLogs: Package the last 7 days of logs for feedback.
messages.settings.description.privacy: Anonymous statistics do not include translated content and API Key.
messages.settings.description.exportConfig: Export JSON settings without API Key.
messages.settings.description.importConfig: Restore settings from JSON, API Key will not be overwritten.
messages.settings.description.reset: Restore default settings, the operation cannot be undone.
messages.settings.description.resetAll: Clear all customizations and API Keys.
messages.settings.description.version: View the current version and build information.
messages.settings.description.changelog: Learn about new capabilities and fixes in the version.
messages.settings.description.homepage: View source code and submit feedback.
messages.settings.description.recommend: Recommend this app to your friends.
messages.settings.dialog.resetDescription: This operation will clear the translation service, shortcut keys and personalization options and cannot be restored.
messages.settings.description.reasoningOff: Does not generate reasoning process, fastest response
messages.settings.description.reasoningLong: Full reasoning, suitable for complex text
messages.settings.toast.apiKeyRequired: Please enter the API Key first
messages.settings.toast.endpointRequired: Please fill in the Endpoint first
messages.settings.toast.emptyModelsDescription: The service provider did not return the model, you can enter it manually
messages.settings.dialog.deleteService: Confirm to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
messages.settings.description.addService: Select a channel. Multiple instances can be created for the same channel.
messages.settings.tooltip.noApiKeyRequired: This service does not require an API Key
messages.settings.tooltip.customOcrUnavailable: Custom OCR service is not available yet
messages.settings.tooltip.llmService: Large language model translation, supports custom inference depth
messages.settings.description.ocrEngine: Windows 10+ system comes with its own OCR engine and does not need to be installed.
messages.settings.description.ocrImplementation: Optical character recognition implementation currently used in Windows
messages.settings.description.networkRequirement: Whether an Internet connection is required to complete the recognition
messages.settings.description.keyRequirement: Whether a configuration key is required
messages.settings.description.canDisable: Whether the engine is allowed to be deactivated
messages.settings.ocr.languages: Supports printed Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Simplified and Traditional Chinese, and 60+ languages
messages.settings.ocr.limitations: Low recognition rate for complex layouts, handwriting and low-contrast content
messages.settings.ocr.useCases: Software UI, menus, web pages, documents and simple layout pictures
messages.settings.ocr.footer: Provided by Windows system · Always available · No network required · Instant recognition
messages.settings.description.endpoint: The full address of the OpenAI compatible protocol.
messages.settings.description.apiKey: Used to call {name}, only stored locally.
messages.settings.description.model: Open the drop-down model, or enter it directly.
messages.settings.description.defaultModel: Can be temporarily overridden when called.
messages.settings.description.chainOfThought: Control the depth of reasoning before the model answers.
messages.settings.description.systemPrompt: Set the AI's role, tone, and terminology rules.
messages.settings.description.translationPrompt: Translation template, supports source_lang, target_lang and text placeholders.
messages.settings.description.reflectionPrompt: Post-translation self-checking and improvement will increase time consumption.
messages.settings.description.note: Add easy-to-remember notes for custom instances.
messages.settings.description.deleteService: Deactivate and clear the instance configuration and cannot be restored.
messages.settings.warning.missingApiKey: The API Key is not configured and the instance cannot be used for translation.
messages.history.noCopyText: This record has no copyable text
messages.history.noSourceToSpeak: This record has no original text that can be read
messages.history.noResultToSpeak: This record has no translation that can be read
messages.history.filterEmptyDescription: Switch to other methods or view all records.
messages.history.selectSession: Select a session from the left to view details
messages.history.clearDescription: This action is irreversible and all history will be permanently deleted.
messages.settings.error.channelNameRequired: The channel name cannot be empty
messages.settings.error.duplicateChannel: A channel with the same name already exists: {name}
messages.settings.error.channelInUse: There are still instances in use for this channel, please delete or migrate the instance first
